name: Aceragen Inc. Common Stock
summary: Aceragen Inc., formerly known as VTV Therapeutics Inc., is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing therapies for rare and severe pulmonary diseases. The company's lead product candidate is ACG-701, a novel oral therapy for the treatment of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis. Aceragen Inc. is headquartered in High Point, North Carolina.
